THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDEZ, LOURDES $507.98 PRINCIPAL, $25.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $533.85, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
